title: Korbond Safety Pins Gilt - 110192
description: From the manufacturer ASSORTED SIZES This pack contains an assortment of sizes, ensuring you have the perfect safety pin for every use. 2 sizes (16mm & 22mm) HARDENED TEMPERED STEEL Pins made from hardened, tempered steel which ensures these pins are stronger and hold their shape better than generic brands and featuring a locking function to keep the desired fastening secure. MULTI USE Ideal for quilting, sewing, crafting, jewellery making, fashion design, saree pinning, nappies, running, marathons and sports events, DIY, repairs, upcycling, emergency hemming and general household tasks. Korbond Gilt Safety Pins are strong, reliable and reusable Pins, ideal for quilting, sewing, crafting, jewellery making, fashion design, saree pinning, nappies, running, marathons and sports events, DIY, repairs, upcycling, emergency hemming and general household tasks. Contents Include: 36 assorted gilt safety pins made from hardened and tempered steel.
